## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Verification
- [ ] `git status --short --branch`
- [ ] Repo-specific checks were run locally if available
- [ ] Docs updated when durable behavior changed

## Safety
- [ ] PR targets `master`
- [ ] Branch is not `master` or `main`
- [ ] No secrets, force-push history rewrites, or unrelated changes included

## Rollback
- [ ] Existing rollback tag policy still works for this change
- [ ] Revert or rollback path is understood
